title: pelargonium theianthum
intro: Pelargonium theianthum, also known as Mountain Rose, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues such as nausea, diarrhea, and indigestion due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium theianthum include reducing anxiety and stress, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
